item.title: The Physics Behind the Quadruple Axel, the Most Difficult Jump in Figure Skating
item.description: Are you speechless watching US figure skater Ilia Malinin on the ice? Science explains how it’s possible the Quad God can do more than four full rotat...

item.title: RFK Jr. Says Americans Need More Protein. His Grok-Powered Food Website Disagrees
item.description: The site Realfood.gov uses Elon Musk’s Grok chatbot to dispense nutrition information—some of which contradicts the government’s new guidelines.

item.title: Palantir CEO Alex Karp Recorded a Video About ICE for His Employees
item.description: In a video shared with Palantir employees, Alex Karp did not explain how ICE is utilizing the company’s products. Instead, workers were told they can ...

item.title: This GoPro and Lens Bundle Is $200 Off
item.description: You can grab a fully kitted action camera and all the lenses for $550.

item.title: ICE Is Expanding Across the US at Breakneck Speed. Here’s Where It’s Going Next
item.description: ICE plans to lease offices throughout the US as part of a secret, monthslong expansion campaign. WIRED is publishing dozens of these locations.
